element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns to navigate 2D space while avoiding mines and booby traps; establishes core movement vocabulary
Introduced in jungle setting; player avoids rather than engages
Player must locate buried explosives within jungle, then navigate out to plant them on bridge
After bridge objective, player collects items needed for next stage progression
Tunnel system introduces radical viewpoint change; player must adapt to new spatial grammar
Player uses map obtained in Stage 1 to navigate tunnel system; spatial literacy requirement
First-person tunnel combat requires quick enemy elimination to advance; sustained tension
Flares collected in Stage 2; critical for visibility in Stage 3 bunker siege
Collected in tunnel; used in final jungle stage for navigation
Flares illuminate enemies in darkness; skilled players can read silhouettes without flares
Player trapped in bunker overnight; must survive constant enemy AI attacks; endurance test
4-minute countdown for final jungle stage; adds urgency to movement and combat
Player must avoid sniper fire while navigating jungle; introduces ranged threat from unknown positions
Final objective requires landing five grenade shots on bunker-based boss; climactic challenge

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully navigating map waypoints in Stage 2
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty across four distinct gameplay paradigms; tension builds through perspective shifts, environmental hazards, and survival mechanics; each stage introduces new stressor (mines→spawning enemies→siege→time+sniper); climax at boss encounter

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate. Stage 1 establishes navigation and obstacle avoidance in jungle setting; player learns spatial movement vocabulary without overwhelming enemy pressure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating. Stage 2 introduces first-person perspective shift and continuous enemy spawning; Stage 3 introduces siege survival with visibility constraint; both demand mechanical adaptation
difficulty_curve.late_game: High difficulty spike. Stage 4 combines time pressure, sniper hazards, compass navigation requirement, and five-hit grenade-based boss; criticized by reviewers for frustrating controls under pressure
notable_spikes: Stage 2 continuous enemy spawning in first-person (paradigm shift + sustained pressure)
Stage 4 time countdown + sniper fire (multiple simultaneous pressures)
Sergeant Barnes boss fight (precision grenade targeting requirement)

notable_level_patterns.description: Stage 1 uses multi-step objective structure: find explosives → navigate out → plant explosives → acquire torch/map. Player agency in pathfinding within loose goal constraints
Stage 2 shifts to first-person tunnel navigation. Player uses collected map as spatial reference. Continuous enemy spawning creates sustained tension throughout traversal
Stage 3 traps player in stationary bunker. Enemies approach from darkness; flares provide visibility. Emphasized endurance over movement; longest single-stage duration implied
Stage 4 imposes hard 4-minute time limit. Combines jungle navigation, sniper avoidance, and compass use. Culminates in boss arena with grenade-targeting mechanic
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Stage 4 - Final Jungle / Sergeant Barnes Encounter

sources_used: wikipedia - Platoon (1987 video game) - Gameplay section
